description: Sage Motel, Monophonics’ fifth studio album since 2012, tells the story of the once thriving, once vibrant establishment of the same name. A place where folks experience the highs and lows of human existence. Produced by brilliant bandleader Kelly Finnigan, the album captures a timeless sound that blends heavy soul with psych-rock. With their previous album, It’s Only Us, garnering over 20 million streams, Monophonics have built a reputation over the past decade as one of the most impactful bands in the genre.
title: Monophonics Concert
